name: Phase Shift: MR Fitness Reflex Game

reviews.review_description:
Phase Shift is a refreshing VR experience. No music gimmicks, no rhythm matching - just pure reaction and focus as you move throught the grid.

Simple concept, but surprisignaly intense and satisfying.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the great feedback! That was exactly our goal — a simple mechanic that creates a strong sense of focus and flow.

reviews.review_title: Way more intense than it looks
reviews.review_description:
At first it looks simple — punch some neon blocks, absorb others with your palm. But once the full grid starts coming at you, it gets serious.
The 360° mode is wild. Being surrounded and trying to clear everything feels really satisfying. You actually have to stay focused the whole time.
I like that it doesn’t rely on music or rhythm. It’s pure reaction and movement. After 20 minutes I was already feeling it in my shoulders.
If you’re looking for something active that really uses hand tracking properly, this is worth trying.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the awesome review! We love hearing that the intensity and full 360° grid experience came through. The goal was exactly that — simple mechanics that turn into a real focus and movement challenge. And yes, those shoulders definitely get a workout!

reviews.review_description: A very engaging VR experience that quickly pulls you into a rhythm of focus and fast reactions. The fist and palm mechanics are simple but feel very satisfying once you start mastering them. The increasing speed keeps the gameplay exciting, and the clean neon visuals make the experience even more immersive. Great for improving reflexes while having fun in VR.

developer_response.body:
Thank you! Really glad the fist/palm mechanics clicked for you — that "simple but satisfying" feel is exactly what I was aiming for as a solo dev.

If you enjoy pushing your reflexes, check out the new Track Editor in v1.2 — you can build your own challenges with your bare hands and share them via code. Would love to see what you come up with!

More updates coming soon.
